name: engine-noise-simulator
description: Synthesized combustion/exotic engine voice for an EV, driven by the phone accelerometer. Includes a headless simulator that tests the accelerometer→throttle mapping and the audio synthesis.

scripts.test: node sim/test-motion.js && node sim/test-speed.js && node sim/test-audio.js && node sim/render-audio.js && node sim/plot.js
